basic_details.job_title: DHS Dindigul Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 14 ANM, OT Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Health Society Dindigul (DHS Dindigul) Various Contractual Posts Notification 2026 has been released on the official website Dindigul District Official Website. A total of 14 vacancies have been announced through the DHS Dindigul Various Contractual Posts Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: ANM: 35 Years Audiologist & Speech Therapists: 35 Years Occupational Therapist: 40 Years Audio metrician: 35 Years Radiographer: 35 Years OT Assistant: 35 Years Mid-Level Health Provider: 50 Years Multi Purpose Hospital Worker: 45 Years

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in GNM/B.Sc Nursing, 8th Standard, BASLP Courses, Bachelors/Master's Degree in Occupational Therapy, 12th grade with science subjects, B.Sc Radiography, 3 Months OT Technician Course, ANM
qualification.details: Mid-Level Health Provider: Diploma in GNM/B.Sc Nursing from a recognized University/Institution. Multi Purpose Hospital Worker: Minimum 8th Standard with the ability to read and write. Audiologist & Speech Therapists: BASLP Courses from a recognized institution. Occupational Therapist: Bachelors/Master's Degree in Occupational Therapy from a recognized University. Audio metrician: 12th grade with science subjects, followed by a one-year certificate course in audiometry from a government or recognized institution, or a Diploma in Hearing Language and Speech (DHLS). Radiographer: B.Sc Radiography. OT Assistant: 3 Months OT Technician Course from recognized University/Institutions. ANM: ANM qualification from Government or Government approved private Auxiliary Nurse Midwife School recognized by the Indian Nursing Council.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Dindigul Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://dindigul.nic.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHS Dindigul recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DHS Dindigul Various Contractual Posts is 08 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the DHS Dindigul recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies announced for various contractual posts by the District Health Society Dindigul. These positions are spread across different roles within the health society.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the DHS Dindigul recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the contractual posts released by DHS Dindigul is 50 years. There might be age relaxations for certain categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary range for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the various contractual posts ranges from Rs. 11,000 to Rs. 32,000 per month, depending on the specific post and its responsibilities.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any application fees for the DHS Dindigul recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualifications vary by post, ranging from a minimum 8th standard pass to Diploma, B.Sc Nursing, BASLP, and Bachelor's/Master's degrees in relevant fields.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these contractual posts?
faq.answer: The primary selection process mentioned for these contractual posts is Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on the verification of their submitted documents.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of District Health Society Dindigul, which is https://dindigul.nic.in/.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions advertised by the District Health Society Dindigul are contractual in nature, meaning they are for a fixed term as per the terms of employment.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the DHS Dindigul recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DHS Dindigul Various Contractual Posts is 08 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.
